page: Microsoft Azure NC24ads_A100_v4 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine powered by an AMD EPYC 7V13 processor. This x86_64 architecture features 24 dedicated physical cores running at 3.7 GHz, with 1.0 thread per core. The CPU configuration includes 32 KB L1d cache, 0.5 MB L2 cache, and 32 MB L3 cache, supporting instruction sets such as AVX, AES, VAES, and SHA_NI.

The server is equipped with 220.0 GB of system memory, providing 9.17 GB per core. It integrates a single NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPU with 80 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage consists of a 1026 GB disk, and the instance is Premium Storage capable, running under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Benchmark results show top-tier performance in LLM inference speeds across small, medium, and large models for both prompt processing and text generation. Passmark memory testing also ranks in the top tier. Stress-ng CPU performance and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression are strong, while memory bandwidth and standard Geekbench scores fall in the average range. This profile makes the instance highly suitable for large language model inference, deep learning, image processing, and memory-intensive database workloads.
description: The Microsoft Azure NC24ads_A100_v4 is a high-performance, GPU-accelerated virtual machine designed for demanding computational workloads. It features a dedicated AMD EPYC 7V13 processor with 24 physical cores running at 3.7 GHz, paired with 220.0 GB of system memory. Acceleration is driven by a single NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPU with 80 GB of VRAM. The server also includes 1026 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. In benchmark testing, the instance demonstrates top-tier performance in LLM inference speeds and Passmark memory scores, alongside strong CPU performance in stress-ng tests. These specifications and performance characteristics make the NC24ads_A100_v4 highly suitable for large language model deployment, deep learning training, image processing, and memory-intensive database operations.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NC24ads_A100_v4 is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 24 AMD EPYC cores, 220 GB RAM, a 1026 GB local disk, and an NVIDIA A100 GPU with 80 GB VRAM, optimized for top-tier LLM inference.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure NC24ads_A100_v4 features 24 AMD EPYC cores, 220 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA A100 80GB GPU, delivering top-tier LLM inference performance.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated platform featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processing, massive memory capacity, and top-tier performance for large language model inference.
bullet_points: Dedicated AMD EPYC 7V13 processor with 24 physical cores at 3.7 GHz
NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPU with 80 GB of dedicated VRAM
220 GB of system memory and 1026 GB of local storage
Top-tier benchmark performance in LLM inference and memory operations
Well-suited for deep learning, image processing, and database workloads
